title: Tool Frontmatter
description: Schema for the YAML frontmatter in every <tools_dir>/<id>.md file

id.description: Snake_case ID used as the filename and in [[wikilinks]]

name.description: Display name of the tool, library, or framework

sources.description: All known URLs for this tool — repo (GitHub/GitLab), docs, blog, etc. The ingest URL lands here when it differs from 'url'.

language.description: Primary programming language(s) the tool is written in or targets

docker.description: Whether an official Docker image or docker-compose setup is available

cloud.description: Whether a managed cloud / hosted service is available (e.g. Pinecone, Weaviate Cloud)

license.description: SPDX license identifier or 'proprietary' — relevant for production use decisions

version.description: Version recorded at time of last_checked — snapshot, not live

last_checked.description: ISO date when this node's metadata was last verified (YYYY-MM-DD) — tool info ages fast

install.description: One-line install command (e.g. 'pip install torch', 'npm install langchain')

alternatives.description: [[wikilink]] references to similar or competing tool nodes

description.description: One-to-two sentence description of what the tool does

concepts.description: [[wikilink]] references to curriculum concepts this tool relates to

verdict.description: User's recommendation — only set from explicit user opinion, never inferred
